series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Home Care Waiver Program Policy and Development Files
series_metadata.series_description: Rule, policy and program development files for Ohio Home Care waiver program, which provides home and community-based alternatives to institutional long term care. To include, policy drafts, amendments, published rules, policy development documentation, proposed funding and grant applications, documented changes to the program, period program evaluations required by CMS, and all other monitoring reports and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office 10 years, and 5 years in record center
